query:
SELECT id, recipientEmail, recipientName, recipientId
FROM email_sends
WHERE campaignId = 120001 AND DATE(createdAt) = '2026-05-18' AND status = 'failed'
ORDER BY id
LIMIT 13 OFFSET 60;
